description_long: This object is a tall, slender potted plant with a single upright green stem and several whorls of elongated, lance-shaped leaves arranged at intervals along the stem. The leaves are a vibrant green, smooth, and slightly glossy, with pointed tips and a subtle central vein. The plant appears to lack any flowers or buds, focusing attention on its foliage. There is no visible pot or container at the base, suggesting the plant is either rendered without one or the pot is minimal and obscured. The overall form is vertical and airy, with leaves radiating outward in a symmetrical pattern. This type of plant is commonly used for decorative purposes in urban environments, such as offices, lobbies, or modern living spaces.
description: A tall, slender potted plant with whorled, lance-shaped green leaves and a single upright stem, lacking visible flowers or a pot.
description_view_0: The plant is seen with its leaves radiating outward, showing a clear vertical stem and symmetrical leaf arrangement.
description_view_1: This view highlights the plant's side profile, with some leaves overlapping and the stem slightly angled.
description_view_2: A direct view of the plant's front, displaying the full height and even spacing of the leaf whorls.
description_view_3: The plant is viewed from another side, with the leaves on the left appearing more prominent and the stem visible throughout.
attribute_plant_species: oleander (Nerium oleander) or similar whorled-leaf plant
